claim_boundary: Under protocol ESA-S5P-METHANE-D208, the official ESA Sentinel-5P product documentation supports the narrow claim that Sentinel-5P is designed and used to measure and monitor atmospheric methane concentrations.
runner_command: uv run claimbound run-root --protocol-id ESA-S5P-METHANE-D208 --source-url https://www.esa.int/Applications/Observing_the_Earth/Sentinel-5P/Methane_monitoring --operator NeoZorK
known_limitations: Source boundary limited to ESA official product pages
Does not evaluate methane detection sensitivity or spatial resolution
Does not assess compliance with emissions reporting frameworks
Card records design and measurement intent, not validation results
baseline_control_summary: Gate: Official ESA source page must explicitly name the mission/capability and confirm the narrow claim. Success means: (1) Source is accessible, (2) Source is from esa.int domain, (3) Relevant claim statement appears in source text, (4) No contradictions with claim boundary.
